stories.headline: America250: How the US heatwave will affect Fourth of July celebrations
stories.description: From Washington to LA, how plans to mark the United States’ 250th anniversary could be disrupted by extreme heat.

stories.headline: England v Mexico: Pubs and police brace for 1am kick-off after Fifa U-turn
stories.description: England's must-win World Cup match will go ahead as planned on Monday. Pubs can stay open until 05:0...

stories.headline: Ukraine hits oil and military facilities near Russia’s St Petersburg
stories.description: Kyiv’s drones disrupt St Petersburg internet and flights as Russian strikes halt a gas facility in central Ukraine.

stories.headline: The massive scramble behind the scenes before the new PM arrives
stories.description: As Starmer gets ready to pack his bags, there's a "bunfight for jobs" in Whitehall, one MP tells Laura Kuenssberg.

stories.headline: Mini-marts linked to convicted people smuggler closed after BBC investigation
stories.description: We traced Twana Jamal, once the "the godfather" of French migrant camps, to two shops in Leicestershire.
